question: Write a C++ program that prompts the user to enter the length and width of a rectangle, then calculates and displays its area and perimeter.

test_cases.expected:
Enter the length of the rectangle: Enter the width of the rectangle: Area: 50
Perimeter: 30

Enter the length of the rectangle: Enter the width of the rectangle: Area: 24
Perimeter: 21.4

Enter the length of the rectangle: Enter the width of the rectangle: Area: -50
Perimeter: 10

Enter the length of the rectangle: Enter the width of the rectangle: Area: 0
Perimeter: 16

errors: Input validation for length and width is missing. Negative or zero dimensions are accepted, leading to geometrically incorrect results (e.g., negative area, non-zero perimeter for zero length/width).
